name: Le Petit Prince Timeseries
description: A set of standardized, detrended, smoothed, masked and vectorized fMRI timeseries from five CNeuroMod subjects who listened to an audiobook of Le Petit Prince in English and in French in the scanner. Timeseries were extracted from preprocessed BOLD signal available in the petit-prince.fmriprep derivates dataset.

creator.name: The Courtois-NeuroMod Project on Neuronal Modelling.

distribution.name: Archived dataset repository
distribution.description: The main GitHub archive of the petit-prince.timeseries dataset repository.

distribution.name: cneuromod26 files
distribution.description: Parent directory for all cneuromod2026 dataset files (timeseries, atlases and masks).

distribution.name: cneuromod26 nested BOLD timeseries
distribution.description: BOLD timeseries extracted with a custom 1134-parcel atlas that complements the schaefer1000 cortical parcels with subcortical and cerebellar parcels.

distribution.name: cneuromod26 parcellation atlases
distribution.description: 3D dseg brain atlas files mapping subjects' brain voxels to the 1134 cneuromod2026 parcel labels.

distribution.name: cneuromod26 grey matter masks
distribution.description: 3D binary grey matter masks derived from freesurfer anatomical segmentation used to select brain voxels in each subject to extract timeseries with the cneuromod2026 parcellation atlas.

distribution.name: schaefer1000 files
distribution.description: Parent directory for all schaefer1000 dataset files (timeseries, atlases and masks).

distribution.name: schaefer1000 nested BOLD timeseries
distribution.description: BOLD timeseries extracted with the schaefer1000 cortical parcellation atlas (7 networks).

distribution.name: schaefer1000 parcellation atlases
distribution.description: 3D dseg brain atlas files mapping subjects' brain voxels to the schaefer1000 parcel labels.

distribution.name: schaefer1000 grey matter masks
distribution.description: 3D binary masks used to select brain voxels to extract timeseries with the schaefer1000 parcellation atlas. Masks were based on the template MNI152NLin2009cAsym grey matter mask intersected with a functional mask derived from the Friends dataset in each subject.

distribution.name: voxel_mni files
distribution.description: Parent directory for all voxel_mni dataset files (timeseries, atlases and mask).

distribution.name: voxel_mni nested BOLD timeseries
distribution.description: Voxel-wise BOLD timeseries in MNI space. Signal was extracted within a grey matter mask of the whole brain.

distribution.name: Grey matter mask in MNI space
distribution.description: 3D binary mask used to extract voxelwise timeseries in MNI space. The template MNI152NLin2009cAsym grey matter mask was intersected with functional masks derived from the Friends dataset in each subject.

distribution.name: voxel_native files
distribution.description: Parent directory for all voxel_native dataset files (timeseries, atlases and masks).

distribution.name: voxel_native nested BOLD timeseries
distribution.description: Voxel-wise BOLD timeseries in native subject space. Signal was extracted within individual grey matter masks of the whole brain.

distribution.name: Grey matter masks in native space
distribution.description: 3D binary grey matter masks derived from freesurfer anatomical segmentation used to extract voxelwise timeseries in each subject.

recordSet.name: cneuromod26-recordset
recordSet.description: A recordset yields one record for each fMRI run completed by a subject, and links each 2D timeseries matrix to its subject-level mask and atlas files.

field.name: subject_id
field.description: The subject identifier (e.g., sub-01) parsed from the directory structure.

field.name: session_run_identifier
field.description: The exact path to the run timeseries matrix inside the HDF5 (e.g., ses-002/ses-002_task-lppFR_run-7_timeseries).

field.name: run timeseries matrix
field.description: The 2D floating-point timeseries array (timepoints, parcels) corresponding to the current HDF5 path.

field.name: associated_atlas_file
field.description: The path to the NIfTI file corresponding to this subject's 3D atlas.

field.name: grey matter mask_file
field.description: The path to the NIfTI file corresponding to this subject's 3D binary grey matter mask.

recordSet.name: schaefer1000-recordset
recordSet.description: A recordset yields one record for each fMRI run completed by a subject, and links each 2D timeseries matrix to its subject-level mask and atlas files.

field.name: subject_id
field.description: The subject identifier (e.g., sub-01) parsed from the directory structure.

field.name: session_run_identifier
field.description: The exact path to the run timeseries matrix inside the HDF5 (e.g., ses-002/ses-002_task-lppFR_run-7_timeseries).

field.name: run timeseries matrix
field.description: The 2D floating-point timeseries array (timepoints, parcels) corresponding to the current HDF5 path.

field.name: associated_atlas_file
field.description: The path to the NIfTI file corresponding to this subject's 3D atlas.

field.name: grey matter mask_file
field.description: The path to the NIfTI file corresponding to this subject's 3D binary grey matter mask.

recordSet.name: voxel_mni-recordset
recordSet.description: A recordset yields one record for each fMRI run completed by a subject, and links each 2D timeseries matrix to its dataset-level mask file.

field.name: subject_id
field.description: The subject identifier (e.g., sub-01) parsed from the directory structure.

field.name: session_run_identifier
field.description: The exact path to the run timeseries matrix inside the HDF5 (e.g., ses-002/ses-002_task-lppFR_run-7_timeseries).

field.name: run timeseries matrix
field.description: The 2D floating-point timeseries array (timepoints, voxels) corresponding to the current HDF5 path.

field.name: grey matter mask_file
field.description: The path to the NIfTI file corresponding to this dataset's 3D binary grey matter mask.

recordSet.name: voxel_native-recordset
recordSet.description: A recordset yields one record for each fMRI run completed by a subject, and links each 2D timeseries matrix to its subject-level mask files.

field.name: subject_id
field.description: The subject identifier (e.g., sub-01) parsed from the directory structure.

field.name: session_run_identifier
field.description: The exact path to the run timeseries matrix inside the HDF5 (e.g., ses-002/ses-002_task-lppFR_run-7_timeseries).

field.name: run timeseries matrix
field.description: The 2D floating-point timeseries array (timepoints, voxels) corresponding to the current HDF5 path.

field.name: grey matter mask_file
field.description: The path to the NIfTI file corresponding to this subject' 3D binary grey matter mask.
